descs.desc:
If this unit's Speed is faster than the target's by 3 or more, Coin Power +1
[WhenUse] If target has 15+ [Burst] and 3+ [Burst] Count, this Skill does not inflict [Burst] Potency with its effects, but does not consume [Burst] Count On Hit
[WhenUse] Gain +2 [Breath] Count

If this unit's Speed is faster than the target's, gain Coin Power based on Speed difference (Coin Power +1 for every 3 Speed difference; max 2)
[WhenUse] If target has 15+ [Burst] and 3+ [Burst] Count, this Skill does not inflict [Burst] Potency with its effects, but does not consume [Burst] Count On Hit
[WhenUse] Gain +2 [Breath] Count
coinDescs:
[OnSucceedAttack] Inflict 1 [Burst]
[OnSucceedAttack] If this unit's Speed is faster than the target's, inflict [Burst] equal to their Speed difference (max 3)

descs.desc:
If this unit's Speed is faster than the target's by 3 or more, Coin Power +1
[WhenUse] If target has 15+ [Burst] and 3+ [Burst] Count, this Skill does not inflict [Burst] Potency or Count with its effects, but does not consume [Burst] Count On Hit
[WinDuel] Gain +2 [Breath] Count

If this unit's Speed is faster than the target's by 3 or more, Coin Power +1
[WhenUse] If target has 15+ [Burst] and 3+ [Burst] Count, this Skill does not inflict [Burst] Potency or Count with its effects, but does not consume [Burst] Count On Hit
[WinDuel] Gain +2 [Breath] Count
coinDescs:
If this unit does not inflict [Burst], +5% Damage on Critical Hit for every [Burst] Potency and Count it would have inflicted
[OnSucceedAttack] Inflict 4 [Burst]
[OnSucceedAttack] At 7+ Speed, inflict +2 [Burst] Count

descs.desc:
If this unit's Speed is faster than the target's by 2 or more, Coin Power +1
[WhenUse] If target has 15+ [Burst] and 3+ [Burst] Count, this Skill does not consume [Burst] Count On Hit
[WinDuel] Gain 5 [Breath]
- If target has [ConcentratedAttackMeursault], gain 5 additional [Breath]
coinDescs:
Deal +10% damage for every [ConcentratedAttackMeursault] on the Slot
+30% Damage on Critical Hit

descs.desc:
If this unit's Speed is faster than the target's, gain Coin Power based on Speed difference (Coin Power +1 for every 2 Speed difference; max 3)
[WhenUse] If target has 15+ [Burst] and 3+ [Burst] Count, this Skill does not consume [Burst] Count On Hit
[WinDuel] Gain 5 [Breath]
- If target has [ConcentratedAttackMeursault], gain 5 additional [Breath]
coinDescs:
Deal +20% damage for every [ConcentratedAttackMeursault] on the Slot
+30% Damage on Critical Hit
- Deal +2% Damage on Critical Hit for every [Burst] on target (max 30%)
[EndSkill] If this Coin defeated the target or destroyed the Part, Reuse this Skill once against a random target (does not activate on Reuse)

descs.desc: [WhenUse] If this unit's Speed is faster than the target's by 3 or more, Coin Power +2

1051101.name: Duel Livestream
1051101.desc:
Gain 1 [Agility] next turn for every 3 [Breath] Potency on self at Turn End (max 2)
On Hit with base Attack Skills: inflict [ConcentratedAttackMeursault] next turn. (once per Skill)

1051111.name: Duel Livestream
1051111.desc:
Gain 1 [Agility] next turn for every 3 [Breath] Potency on self at Turn End (max 2)
On Hit with base Attack Skills: inflict [ConcentratedAttackMeursault] next turn. (once per Skill)
If this unit attacked the Slot with [ConcentratedAttackMeursault] and defeated its owner or broke the Part, heal 7 SP

1051121.name: One Step Ahead
1051121.desc: The fastest ally, on Clash Win, gains 1 [Agility] next turn (2 times per turn)
